entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: The legume crop studied for its response to fungicide, spacing, and growth habit.

entities.name: ICCL 87322
entities.description: A chickpea genotype with tall, erect, and compact growth habit.

entities.name: H 208
entities.description: A traditional chickpea genotype with a bushy, spreading growth habit.

entities.name: PLANT GROWTH HABIT
entities.description: The physical structure of the plant, which varies between genotypes.

entities.name: INTER-ROW SPACING
entities.description: The distance between crop rows, tested at 30 X 10 and 60 X 5 cm.

entities.name: BOTRYTIS GREY MOLD
entities.description: A fungal disease that affects chickpea yield and health.

entities.name: B. CINEREA
entities.description: The fungal pathogen used to artificially inoculate chickpea plants.

entities.name: VINCLOZOLIN
entities.description: A fungicide spray used to reduce the severity of grey mold.

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The measure of agricultural productivity of the chickpea genotypes.

relationships.description: characterized by tall, erect and compact growth
shows lower disease ratings than H 208
